message:
feat(conformance): add string differential test suite and expand polynomial fixtures

Two additions to the conformance framework:

1. String differential test suite (~450 lines in lib.rs):
   - Add StringDifferentialCase struct with fields for string ops
     (lhs/rhs strings, arg_string, cmp, repeat, expected values/strings)
   - Add run_string_differential_suite() runner with mismatch collection
     and JSON report artifact generation
   - Add execute_string_differential_operation() dispatcher covering
     27 string operations: upper, lower, capitalize, title, strip,
     lstrip, rstrip, swapcase, replace, add, multiply, str_len, count,
     find, rfind, startswith, endswith, isalpha, isdigit, isalnum,
     isspace, isupper, islower, isnumeric, isdecimal, istitle, equal,
     not_equal, greater, greater_equal, less, less_equal,
     compare_chararrays
   - Add string_differential_cases.json fixture with Unicode test data
     (emoji, CJK, accented chars) covering all operations
   - Register suite in run_all_core_suites and add integration test

2. Expanded polynomial fixtures (6 new golden-value cases):
   - polyfit degree-6 ill-conditioned, poly from close roots
   - Roundtrip cases for cheb2poly/poly2cheb, leg2poly/poly2leg

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
